scripts.db:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d postgres
scripts.compose:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f app postgres
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f postgres
scripts.db:setup: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check public/dashboard.js && node --check public/theme.js && node --test
